reference: Hi, I have started working out, or should I say walking. Today I ran for two minutes after I warmed up, and I thought my head would explode. It felt like I had severe pressure in my head. Is this normal or could it be something else? It happened about three weeks ago when I went fishing and reeled in a fish that was way out, and my head started hurting really badly. Please help!
text: Hi, I have started working out, or should I say, walking. Today I ran for two minutes after I warmed up, and I thought my head would explode. It felt like I had severe pressure in my head. Is this normal, or could it be something else? It happened about three weeks ago when I went fishing and reeled in a fish that was way out, and my head started hurting really badly. Please help.
